creator: dog@virtual.org.ua
text:
Installation of editors/lazarus interrupts with the following error:

===>  unixODBC-2.3.0 conflicts with installed package(s): 
      firebird-client-2.0.3_4

      They install files into the same place.
      Please remove them first with pkg_delete(1).
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/unixODBC.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/fpc-odbc.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/fpc-odbc.

How-To-Repeat: Try to install editors/lazarus port.
